The [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom]] '''Q-Signal Messenger Drone''' was an automated communications [[Droid/Legends|droid]] with the capability to enter [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. They were used to deliver detailed information, and incorporated an eight cubic meter cargo bay for delivering physical information or samples. The Q-Signal was a one shot unit, and had no communications array. [[Astrogation/Legends|Astrogation]] coordinates were loaded into the automated droid brain, and then the drone was launched towards its destination. Once the drone reached its target, it dropped to [[Realspace/Legends|realspace]]. The drone had to be physically retrieved, and a proper [[password]] entered to retrieve the records and samples contained within.

The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'' employed six Q-Signal Messenger Drones to send reports back to [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]] during its hunt for [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]].

{{Droid-stub}}
